annotation.text: We need to add a mention of dogfooding the deskwork scope discovery protocol tooling in this feature implementation plan. It should be explicitly scoped into this feature documentation so we don’t forget it
annotation.anchor:
The two problems are entangled: graphical entries need their own pipeline shape (no "Outlining"; "Shipped" as terminal, not "Published"), and the project-wide single-pipeline assumption is what blocks them.
Solu
